TextENGNew: I braced myself and squeezed my eyes shut as the crack of a gunshot sliced through the air.
Of course, closing my eyes wouldn't deflect a bullet. All that awaited me was the impact somewhere on my body... and then the countdown to death.
changeReason: Original says 'I can't dodge bullets'; new says 'closing my eyes wouldn't deflect a bullet' -- different framing of the futility. JPN focuses on closing eyes specifically not helping.

TextENGNew: What does dying feel like, I wonder.
changeReason: Original 'Is this what death feels like?' (asking about current experience) vs new 'What does dying feel like, I wonder' (speculative question). JPN uses wondering form.

TextENGNew: Would it be like before -- a sudden explosion of pain, a crushing weight and lethargy dragging me to the ground?
Or would my consciousness simply cut out, like someone hitting the off switch on a television?
Having never died before... how could I possibly know?
...And yet.
This moment before death... was it always this long? This quiet?
changeReason: Original 'feels so long. So quiet' (declarative) vs new 'was it always this long? This quiet?' (questioning). JPN uses questioning form だろうか.

TextENGNew: I couldn't hear a thing.
changeReason: Tense change: present 'I can't hear anything' to past 'I couldn't hear a thing' shifts temporal perspective.

TextENGNew: I can't see anything. ...Oh, right. That's because my eyes are closed.
And so,
Almost on impulse, without any real thought behind it... I opened my eyes.
changeReason: Original 'I managed to open my eyes' implies difficulty; new 'Almost on impulse... I opened my eyes' matches JPN なんとなく meaning acting without deliberate intent.

TextENGNew: For a moment, I couldn't process the scene before me.
There stood Takano, directly in front of me, her handgun raised and a triumphant smile on her face.
The Mountain Dogs were surrounding me.
And, just a few dozen centimeters from my eyes, I could see a silver bullet floating in the air.
...What is this...?
It was like watching a movie and time froze because the projector broke.
No.
It actually stopped.
I struggled to move my body... but it wouldn't budge.
Just like everything else around me, my body remained firmly fixed in place.
So, once time starts moving again... this bullet right in front of me is going to take my life?
``Is this... the world... of my death...?``
At last... I remembered.
I'm certain that I experienced the same phenomenon... in some other world.
And Takano was my adversary back then, too.
I was trying to steal a car and battling against the Mountain Dogs with the other club members.
The moment we launched our simultaneous attack... I was shot by Takano, who we had failed to even notice.
``...N...No, Kei-chan...``
``It... It's Takano-san...!@k@vS14/02/220200113. She shot the gun...?!@k@vS14/02/220200114. She shot Keiichi-kun?!``
In the frozen world, Takano was smiling, still aiming her gun at Keiichi...
Takano had been watching us from the van this whole time.
She came out and fired her gun, knowing that we hadn't seen her at all.
``......Heh... heh heh heh heh!@k@vS14/01/280100201. I see... I get it now.@k@vS14/01/280100202. So Takano-san was the bad guy all along...``
``What are we going to do!@k@vS14/06/220600234. Kei-chan! Can't you try and twist your body to avoid the bullet!?``
``Don't be stupid!@k@vS14/01/280100204. Time has totally stopped.@k@vS14/01/280100205. I can't move at all...!``
``Th-then, try moving right as soon as time starts moving again!@k@vS14/04/220400175. That might make a difference!``
...Everyone was desperate to save Keiichi. However, no matter how hard we thought, we couldn't come up with any ideas to save him from the bullet.
We were so desperate that Keiichi started to laugh.
So, that's it...
In the end, the situation is no different from back then...?
And I'm going to die right here...?
Just... like this...
Suddenly, I heard a voice.
It felt somewhat... no, it was extremely familiar... It was ``her`` voice.
``...Keiichi.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1203. Do you intend to give up here?``
And then, the source of that voice,
revealed itself... right before my eyes.
``R-Rika-chan...?!``

``Answer me, Keiichi.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1205. Are you willing to give up here?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1206. Unable to protect your dear friends and unable to reciprocate the trust they placed in you? Are you really okay with dying here?``
``S-saying that won't change anything...!``
I suddenly cursed faintheartedly. No matter how hard I tried, my entire body was unable to move. So, what did she expect me to do in a situation like this?!
``I don't want to give up at a time like this, either!@k@vS14/01/220100325. I'd never, ever want to die failing to protect everyone!@k@vS14/01/220100326. But... my body just won't move...!!``
``...It won't move because you think so.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1208. You gave up and said the same thing back then.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1209. ...Or am I wrong?``
``Even if you say that, my entire body just can't move!@k@vS14/01/220100328. What do you expect me to do here?!``

``...Your entire body...?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1211. That's not true.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1212. Then what about your eyes?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1213. Your mouth?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1214. Your ears?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1215. And your head? And your heart?``
``They're still moving, aren't they?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1217. And that red blood should be flowing through your entire body, shouldn't it?``
``They're moving by the power of your will.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1219. It's your desire to live and to protect others. Your kind and noble soul is guiding you.``

``So, wish even stronger.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1221. Gather more strength, more ferocity. If you wish to defeat the enemy before you and protect your precious friends, command your innards, your limbs, and even your fingertips to do it!``
``Fate is but an illusion. Even the power of gods is meaningless!``
``It's not Heaven, or the gods, or even coincidence that decides how the dice fall!``
``It's your strength of will. The indomitable will that can tear through anything!!``
``Gh... Guoooooaaaah...!!``
I suddenly sensed a hint of strength in my fingertips.
And the base of my feet.
My heart was burning hot and beating strong. I could feel the blood coursing through my whole body.
That's right.
Not yet.
It's not over yet.
It can't end yet.
I... can't let it end like this!!!
``Keiichi Maebara.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1226. You've sinned greater than anyone else, and that's what made you such a strong-hearted person with a passion to be kind and noble!``
``We've faced many crossroads and, while there may have been some miracles helping out, it was your strength that overcame them and burst through those walls!``

``So, don't give in!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1229. Stand up!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1230. Rise up now!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1231. And just like you did back then, show me that fate is far more fragile and fleeting than human will... Keiichiii!!!``
``Whooooooooooah...!!``
...My thoughts ceased for a moment, like I was denying what was right in front of me.
Impossible.
That's impossible.
I could smell the smoke coming from the muzzle of my gun. ...So, I did fire a shot. With this gun, pointed straight at Keiichi Maebara...!

He was only a few meters away. I had aimed straight between his eyebrows, intending to be merciful and at least let him die without suffering... and yet, the bullet had struck the stone pavement far behind him.
Keiichi was directly in front of me when I held the gun up. I'm certain of it.
And yet, how?
He was lying on the cobblestone with his upper body twisted to the side, as if he dodged the bullet.
What happened?
Maybe I got too excited and was in a trance?
``...Nh,@k@vS14/01/VT4Bc_keiichi1105. raaaaaaaaahhh!!!``
Just then, Keiichi took that momentary lack of action as a chance to rush forward while letting out a war cry.
Witnessing that made me unsettled for a moment, but I quickly regained my composure and aimed my gun once again toward the brave but foolish boy who had no regard for my advantage here.
...However.
The trigger suddenly gave hard resistance and wouldn't budge.
I turned my gaze downward and gasped when I saw the shell casing for the bullet I just fired was caught in the ejection chamber, jamming the slide mechanism...!
``Uoooryaaaaaahhh!!!``
``Wha...?@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1049. Aaaaaaaaghh?!``
He moved far faster than I could react.
Keiichi ran up to me without any hesitation... and delivered a blow to my face with the weight of his entire body behind it.
And having never been in a proper fight before, I was unable to prepare myself for it. I let out a miserable scream as it struck me, then fell to the ground on the spot.
``Ugh...!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1051. Y-you...!!``
Intense pain ran through me, as a large volume of blood erupted from my mouth and nose.
He hit me...? This guy... hit me in the face?!
How could you...? How dare youuuuu!!!
``...K-kill him!!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1053. Shoot and kill this brat, noooow!!!``
``R...right!!``
The soldiers who were watching in bewilderment finally came to their senses after receiving a direct order, then quickly tried to swap their stun guns with ones carrying live ammo.
However... there was one person who took immediate action, not wanting to waste that momentary opening...!
``Aaaaahh!!``
It was... Satoko. She moved toward a soldier with cat-like agility and snatched a silver tube-like object attached to his belt. Then...
``Keiichi-san, Rika!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1044. Close your eyes!``
``Yaaahh!!!``
Satoko slammed it on the ground without a moment of hesitation.
That instant, the surrounding area was enveloped in a dazzling flash...!
``Gwaahh?!``
``Uoohh?!``
It happened so suddenly, there was no way to stop it. All of the soldiers, myself included, were directly hit by the light, and the pain and dizzying vision had us spinning wildly.
...It wasn't until I could make out Satoko's voice in my muffled hearing that I realized she had activated a flash grenade.
``...Now!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1047. This way, both of you!!``
``Sh...shit!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1055. Hurry... chase after them!!``
I could see Keiichi and the others fleeing to the far end of the shrine grounds behind my hazy vision warped with indescribable colors, so I shouted out an order.
But sadly, all the soldiers had suffered a direct hit from the flash. They couldn't even stand, much less move around.
And needless to say, shooting was utterly impossible with their eyes in that condition...!!
Damn it... Damn it, damn it, damn it!!!
A sequence of unforeseen ``coincidences`` and a moment of carelessness gave them an opportunity to completely turn the situation around... What a disgrace!!
Filled with pain and nausea, I wildly opened my eyes... And just then.
As if to cut off my view of Keiichi's and the others' backs as they ran away...
...She was standing right here...!!
``I-it can't be... Gh!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1057. Wh-why are you... Why?!``
When that figure faintly came into view... I was completely startled.
Because... it was ``Rika Furude.``
Even though I'm certain she was running away with Keiichi...!!

``Hee hee... It's been a long time, Takano.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1233. Your strong will truly is impressive.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1234. But your soul is a lonely abyss that can't help but swallow everything.``
``Yet you persist in fighting...?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1236. You wish to rise beyond the limits of your physical form, even now when you have nothing to gain from it...?``
``O-of course...!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1059. I'd never... never just allow you to be happy...!``
``I-I've forged a path to destiny, with my own strength!@k@vS14/09/VT4Bc_takano1061. So, I... absolutely refuse to accept your existence!!``
``Then... let us fight.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1238. Until you're satisfied.@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1239. ...But, I will not lose to you.``
When I rubbed my eyes... her figure disappeared, just like Keiichi and the others.
Wh...what the hell?! Was that really a person?! Or was it...?!
``This way, both of you!@k@vS14/04/220400178. Please follow my lead, stepping exactly where I step!!``
Satoko ran along the mountain trail at a brisk pace, guiding Rika-chan and me.
The mountains behind the Furude Shrine were Satoko's home turf, so of course she had no hesitation as she led the way.

And what's more, this trail was apparently the culmination of Satoko's trap work, so the screams and gunshots of the Mountain Dogs pursuing us quickly diminished... and before long, we couldn't hear them at all.
Even looking around a bit, the ropes and logs scattered here and there were well-camouflaged by the foliage.
What would happen if these things activated...? Just imagining her saying ``no mercy`` sent a chill down my back.

``Hold on Keiichi-san, you simply mustn't look away!@k@vS14/04/220400180. You absolutely cannot step anywhere except the places I've stepped upon!!@k@vS14/04/220400181. And do not touch the tree trunks!!``
``R-roger...!``
Somehow, Satoko looked completely full of life since we got here. Still, it's reliable to have her at our side, so I welcome it.
On the other hand... Rika-chan...

She must've misstepped while looking down, because Rika-chan stumbled on a rock and fell to the ground. And her face twisted in pain as she remained on the ground, like she'd hit her knee on something.
``Rika-chan!``
I carefully picked Rika-chan up and sat her down on an empty section of the ground. She must've cut her knee on a stone or something, because it was bleeding.
``Meep... It hurts...``
``Satoko, do you have any band-aids or something?``
``You realize I was a hostage until just a few moments ago.@k@vS14/04/220400184. ...But, I do have just one.``

Satoko wiped the dirt away with a handkerchief as she said that, then pasted it on. It would be really nice to pour some disinfectant or water on it, but that's a luxury we can't afford at the moment. Satoko and I took a breath and then stood up once again.
``Now, let's hurry!@k@vS14/04/220400186. If we continue just a little further, we'll be able to ambush them with the ultimate trap!``
``Rika-chan, can you stand?@k@vS14/01/220100348. ...Rika-chan?``
``...What was that?``
``I'm fine...@k@vS14/05/220500309. I can stay here...``
Then, Rika-chan let go of my hand, squatted down on her knees, and buried her face.
Her eyes were hollow, and I couldn't sense any of the vitality I felt back when she was confronting Takano.
``R...Rika-chan! What are you saying?!@k@vS14/01/220100351. If you stay here, those people are just going to catch you and kill you, right?!``
``...Keiichi, Satoko, you two go on ahead.@k@vS14/05/220500311. I should be able to buy you a little time if I stay here...``
``Rika, how do you expect us to agree to that nonsense?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1049. Don't even joke about us running away and leaving you behind!!``
``Please, leave me be...@k@vS14/05/220500313. You don't need to worry about me any more...``
``If I was willing to do that, I never would've given myself up as a hostage!@k@vS14/04/220400190. Now stand up! We need to hurry!!``
``...And what will happen if we run?@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1241. What will become of us if we keep running like this?!``
Rika-chan shook her head and looked back at us, as huge tears ran down her face.
``Rika-chan...``

``I did my best!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1243. I desperately fought to save everyone this time, and win back our happy lifestyle!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1244. I believed in so many things... I wanted to try believing, just one more time!``

``And then, right when I was beginning to have hope this might finally be it, it was all shattered!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1246. Right before my eyes!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1247. I knew it! Even this time, it's all useless!!``

``Everyone is about to die!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1249. Every single person in the village is going to develop terminal symptoms!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1250. It's too late to stop it!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1251. There's nothing we can do about it!``
``I did all I could to protect everyone, but the enemy is so far beyond us!!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1253. Tell me, even if we manage to survive this, what's going to happen?!``
Rika-chan screamed and cried out the words she'd been holding back until now. All we could do was stand there and listen quietly.
It was a deep, sorrowful despair... that Rika-chan alone could understand.
Resentment and resignation for having lived through the same period hundreds or thousands of times, expecting, hoping, trying... only to keep receiving despair that trumped it all.
It's easy to simply pity her... because we don't have to truly understand the meaning of her sorrow.
But I'm sure... there's the only one person who can understand that feeling...
``...Rika... I need to...!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1255. I can't apologize to Rika enough...!``
``...Rika-chan?``
That utterance had me feeling uncomfortable.
Rika-chan... wants to apologize to ``Rika?``
No matter how confused she's been, Rika has never referred to herself in the third person. And what would apologizing to yourself even mean?
...No, wait.
Is there... something important that I'm forgetting?

I could hear human voices coming from the path we just came from. There should have been traps in front of here that they wouldn't have been able to easily escape from, but it's a different story if they weren't coming alone.
There's not much time left...
``Rika-chan, we can talk later.@k@vS14/01/220100356. ...For now, we need to focus on staying alive.``

``And what will happen if we survive?!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1257. I wanted to live happily, having tons of fun with everyone!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1258. But everyone will be gone!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1259. They won't be here with me!!``

``In the end, we couldn't escape from this fate!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1261. So many people got caught up in this!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1262. ...And it's all my fault!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1263. In the end, I... I'm the one that made everyone unhappy! Doing nothing but watching Rika's fated death over and over!!``
*pow*
``...Rika, please, that's enough!!``
With her hand on her now red cheek, Rika-chan continued sobbing but looked up in shock.
Satoko looked down at Rika-chan after slapping her... and with tears in her eyes as well, she looked straight at Rika-chan and spoke.

``...Have you forgotten what you told me?@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1051. Weren't you the one who gave me the courage and pride to fight Teppei even after being covered in wounds? Where did that version of you go?!``
``Rika wasn't whining and crying like this back then!!``
``...For the longest time... I had given up, thinking I couldn't help you.``
``...But now, it's different...!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1266. Fate means nothing as long as you have the strength of will. So we can burst right through that dead end!``
``...And as long as we're willing to take action, we can open the door to anything!!@k@vS14/05/VT4Bc_rika1268. I'll prove it to you...! Right here, right now!!``

``Or was it something else?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1053. Were you only able to say that because you were calm deep down at the time?@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1054. Was it just lip service you could say only because you pitied me? Because you thought yourself in a superior position to me?!``
``If that's the truth, I won't forgive you!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1054b. I'll never, ever forgive you!!``
``Please remember, Rika!@k@vS14/04/220400202. The noble strength you showed me, that brought hope to my closed heart and dragged me out of the darkness!``
``And the kindness to reject overwhelming opposition and come to my aid!``
``You're not the kind of person right in front of me. Rika Furude is my most proud, most treasured friend!!``
``So please, keep on struggling to go on living!@k@vS14/04/220400206. This time, I'll be the one to guide you! Got it?!``
Vigorously,
And with a firm, sincere heart,
Satoko reached her hand out.
Satoko Houjou.
Who always hid in the shadow of others.
And ran from the cold treatment the villagers gave her.
Who used to shrink back, afraid of violence... That old Satoko is long gone.
Right here, right in front of Rika-chan and me, our irreplaceable friend was reborn full of pride and courage!
Rika-chan timidly held out her hand.
And then, Satoko firmly grabbed it and tried to pull her up... but the grief and difference in body weight caused her to stagger backwards.
``Wh-whoa...``
I grabbed the two of them and held them tight to support them.
``...Keiichi...``
``We can do this, Rika-chan!@k@vS14/01/220100358. And you too, Satoko!``

Rika-chan raised her head and opened her eyes, which had finally regained their luster, and then vigorously nodded. Satoko flashed her a peace sign with her hand while holding her tight in her other hand.
``Oh ho ho ho!@k@vS14/04/VT4Bc_satoko1056. Who do you think you're speaking to?``
``Keiichi-san, the area up ahead is packed with super A-class traps that could easily send even you to Hell~!!``
``All riiiight!!@k@vS14/01/220100360. Ok Satoko, let's enjoy seeing your artistry at work!!``
````Yeaaaaahh!!!````
``...Right, yes.@k@vS14/14/223400072. It seems the detached force has silently withdrawn.``

``We'll head to the mountains behind the shrine to secure R in the next 10 minutes.@k@vS14/14/223400074. I'll be going too... Yes, no need to worry.@k@vS14/14/223400075. We'll move all troops to higher ground immediately to get them out of harm's way.``
Okonogi was half-sick of his commanding officer's hysterics on the other end of the receiver, but he remained calm and responded like a proper court servant.

He felt a bit uncomfortable that this unexpectedly great resistance had withdrawn so easily, but he figured they were getting their equipment in order, and so hurried down the road to the shrine as ordered.
The squads divided into their respective vans, then continued down the mountain road where R and her friends were hiding. ...The intent was to strategically surround them and smoke them out.
``Commander, all units are standing by in position!``
``Very well.@k@vS14/14/223400077. Major, please give the order.``

``...This is Takano.@k@vS14/09/220900182. Make sure you capture R alive.@k@vS14/09/220900183. I don't care if you kill the rest!!@k@vS14/09/220900184. Don't let them escape!@k@vS14/09/220900185. Finish it right there!!``
``Nightingale, Skylark, Heron, start hunting.@k@vS14/14/223400079. Phoenix will be the goalkeeper and we'll be the reserve.@k@vS14/14/223400080. Be ready for anything!``
``This is Phoenix 7, roger that.``
``Let's begin!!!``
The Mountain Dogs started marching, spreading out in a line with a few meters between them.

This mountainside was a savage land where not even the villagers would dare tread. There were some trails, but no paved roads for human beings. It required an enormous amount of diligence and patience to hunt on a mountain like this.

All the Dogs were very nervous. Though the enemies were just children, the initial advance team was allegedly silenced by an unknown number of traps. And given their terrain advantage, it would be tough from the start.
``...Sorry to keep you waiting.@k@vS14/14/223400083. For now, arrangements are complete.@k@vS14/14/223400084. After this, we just need to wait for them to get smoked out.``
``...Okonogi,@k@vS14/09/220900187. how many people do you usually need to search a mountain?``
``It's hard to say, but I'm sure that the more people we have, the better the position we'll be in.@k@vS14/14/223400086. But all the Mountain Dogs put together won't be even close to enough.``

``...But our enemies are just a small group of people. Don't you think we're at an advantage?@k@vS14/09/220900189. Well, you know what people always say.@k@vS14/09/220900190. It takes thrice the forces to break a defense. We have twice more than that on our side.``

``Well, that theory works if we're talking about thousands of soldiers.@k@vS14/14/VT4Bc_okono1034. ...But I don't think it applies in small-scale battles in jungle or mountain regions.@k@vS14/14/VT4Bc_okono1035. The history books have proven as much.``
``...Then, in this case,@k@vS14/09/220900192. how great of a force do you think you need to search this mountain, Okonogi?``
``Heh heh heh heh.@k@vS14/14/223400091. Whatever works, I guess.``
``I don't know what you mean by that... what would be an appropriate military force?``

``Though there are only three enemies, there are traps littered across the entire area.@k@vS14/14/223400093. Plus, they're not hastily set up. They're well thought-out.@k@vS14/14/223400094. So it's best to think the enemies have more attack strength than their numbers suggest.``
``...I understand that, but they're still only children?``
``That's what I'd think too, but we're in their territory.@k@vS14/14/223400096. One kid who knows an area well can be equal to a finely-trained patrol unit.``
``...They are more troublesome than you think, Major.``
``...Then... then tell me how great of a force you'll need to actually suppress them.``

``We'll need one division.@k@vS14/14/223400099. Ah, let me explain what I mean by that. Three or four Mountain Dogs make a battalion, and three or four battalions make a regiment.@k@vS14/14/223400100. And finally, three or four regiments make a division.``
``A-Are you saying we need ten times as many people?!``

``Of course, that alone isn't enough.@k@vS14/14/223400102. We'd need to get in touch with an artillery base and request an advance bombardment.@k@vS14/14/223400103. If we could get help from the air, I'd want a Phantom to drop napalm bombs.``
``You've got to be kidding me! We don't have that much force at our disposal!@k@vS14/09/220900198. ...What do you think would happen if we tried to chase them down with our current manpower!?``
``Well, it won't be easy, that's for sure.@k@vS14/14/223400105. Heh heh heh heh, hahahahahahahaha...!``
Okonogi laughed boldly. ...He said it wouldn't be easy, but he also seemed to be implying that he was the only one capable of doing it.
``Although this is their territory, they just got there a little while ago.@k@vS14/14/223400107. The forward advance team should've used up a lot of the traps they set up.``

``And what's more, if they don't have a well-secured headquarters, the tension and constant movements will continue building up fatigue.@k@vS14/14/223400109. A scorched earth strategy should be enough to win this fight.``
Takano was feeling a little anxious as she listened to Okonogi's assessment.
The forward advance team was an excellent squad that had served as Takano's personal guard.
...And yet they were silenced in no time at all.
Satoko's traps were dangerous, of course... but more than that, she had that conversation with ``Rika`` stuck in her ears and it wouldn't go away...!
``...And what about the chemical dispersal team...?@k@vS14/09/220900201. Still no contact...?!``
``Skylark to base. We've located some of the targets.@k@vS14/00/hiba0111018. We can't see R.@k@vS14/00/hiba0111019. We're still searching!``
``...We can use them as hostages!!@k@vS14/09/220900203. Capture them even if R isn't there!!``
``Nightingale, did you hear that?@k@vS14/00/hiba0111021. Gather up the nearby units and block their escape route!!``
``Roger. We'll back you up.``

``Damn it!!@k@vS14/00/hiba0411002. ...This is Skylark 4, we've been attacked!@k@vS14/00/hiba0411003. Shit, don't let them get away!!@k@vS14/00/hiba0411004. They let loose tons of logs!!@k@vS14/00/hiba0411005. Skylark 6 sprained his ankle. Unable to pursue.@k@vS14/00/hiba0411006. We'll go on without him!``
``Heh heh heh heh, don't let them escape.@k@vS14/00/hiba0111023. Keep chasing them until the end. Don't even give them a chance to rest!!``
``This is Skylark 11, we've encountered a trap!@k@vS14/00/hiba1111002. Skylark 12 and 13 probably have concussions!@k@vS14/00/hiba1111003. We would have been dead if we weren't lucky!!``

``Th-This is Skylark 16, a trap got me.@k@vS14/00/hiba1611002. I'm tangled in steel wires. Unable to escape.@k@vS14/00/hiba1611003. I can't cut them with my knife.@k@vS14/00/hiba1611004. Somebody bring a wire cutter!!``
Chaotic radio transmissions came in, one after another. ...Obviously, Okonogi had been wrong about the Mountain Dogs being in an advantageous position.

``Nightingale 10 to base!!@k@vS14/00/ugu1011002. Those bastards disguised a pit trap with a well!!@k@vS14/00/ugu1011003. Two members fell in. Unable to rescue them!!@k@vS14/00/ugu1011004. We need help!!@k@vS14/00/ugu1011005. Huh? Whaahhh, stop!!!``
``What's the matter, Nightingale 10?@k@vS14/14/223400111. Come in, Nightingale 10!!``

``...Th...This is Nightingale 10, I've been hit...@k@vS14/00/ugu1011007. I was pushed from behind...@k@vS14/00/ugu1011008. Nightingale 9 through 11 are in the well now.@k@vS14/00/ugu1011009. We're unharmed, but unable to escape. Shit!!``
``Base to Nightingale, your backup has been attacked.@k@vS14/14/223400113. The enemy can see your movements!! Watch out!!``
``This is Nightingale 1.@k@vS14/00/ugu0111007. I have a question. How can they see our movements?@k@vS14/00/ugu0111008. There's no UAV in the air or anything!!``

``Skylark 1 to base. We failed in our pursuit!@k@vS14/00/hiba0111025. We lost them!@k@vS14/00/hiba0111026. This is impossible. This mountainside is full of traps!!@k@vS14/00/hiba0111027. We've already had a lot of injured men, and only covered a short distance!!``
``Heron 1 to HQ. We found R and some of her friends.@k@vS14/00/shira0111004. We're going after them. We need assistance immediately!!``
``...Heh, heh heh heh heh heh!!@k@vS14/14/223400116. They split up, huh?@k@vS14/14/223400117. Their plan is to confuse and entangle us with traps...``
``Heron 1, be careful!!@k@vS14/14/223400119. They're luring you into a trapped area!!``
``They're splitting up to divert us and are planning an ambush!@k@vS14/14/223400121. This is an extremely advanced tactic!!``

``There have already been many injuries in the other units due to those traps and ambushes.@k@vS14/14/223400123. Be careful!!@k@vS14/14/223400124. Be prepared for anything, Heron 1!!@k@vS14/14/223400125. ...Heron 1?``

``...H-Heron 2 to base!@k@vS14/00/shira0211002. Heron 1 is trapped!!@k@vS14/00/shira0211003. Come on, somebody cut the rope!!@k@vS14/00/shira0211004. The rest of you, keep going, don't let R escape!!``

``Nightingale 1 to base.@k@vS14/00/ugu0111010. Nightingale 7 and his team have gone silent.@k@vS14/00/ugu0111011. It's very possible that they've been attacked.@k@vS14/00/ugu0111012. Allow us to send assistance!``
``This is Heron 5, three of our unit members have been knocked out by falling drums!@k@vS14/00/shira0511002. What the hell is this?!@k@vS14/00/shira0511003. Are there more of those ahead of us?!``

``...Th-This is Skylark 13.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1015. ...I was down...@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1016. ...Ah!!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1017. There's one of them now!!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1018. I'll chase them down!!!@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1019. Dammit, I'm going to get you!!!``
``St... stop, stop Skylark 13!!!@k@vS14/00/hiba0111029. You can't take them down by yourself!!!``
``Oh ho ho ho ho!!@k@vS14/04/220400213. Come out, come out, wherever you are! Come on, this way!!!``
``Damn kid!!@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1021. Wait right theeeeeere!!!``
Skylark 13 chased Satoko with an enraged snarl on his face. But Satoko ran through the woods effortlessly.

Small branches scratched his body all over. But he continued to chase Satoko. ...Satoko ran like the wind. To her, she was simply running in her own backyard. Who would get injured in a place like that?
As Skylark 13 ran after her, he passed many Mountain Dogs who couldn't even move because of Satoko's traps.
The more of his trapped fellows he saw, the more he wasn't sure if the girl he was after was really a girl. She was just something that looked like one!
He reached an area where logs were stacked up in piles. It seemed like the trees in the area were being chopped down.
It was a rather strange scene.

On his way there, Skylark 13 saw a member from a different unit hanging upside down from a tree, and he also saw feet sticking out of a pitfall. There was a member whose foot was tied to the root of a tree with a device that looked like a pair of handcuffs.
He reached this area after seeing all of them.
He suddenly started sweating all over his body. For Skylark 13 realized that he had been lured into a trap. He had been caught in a snare. She had tricked him...!!
The girl was standing in the middle of the open area, calmly balancing on a stump. She was simply looking at him. ...Shit, he thought. She's trying to lure me in!!!
``This is Skylark 13...!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1023. I chased one of them to an open field!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1024. I'll catch her, I'll get her!!!``
``This is Nightingale 7... I'm the one hanging behind you...@k@vS14/00/ugu0711002. That isn't a girl. That's a demon...@k@vS14/00/ugu0711003. If you chase her, you'll end up in Hell!!``
``Base to Skylark 13!@k@vS14/14/223400127. That's enough! Wait for assistance!!@k@vS14/14/223400128. Some nearby members are on their way!!``
``Oh ho ho ho ho.@k@vS14/04/220400215. What's the matter, huh?@k@vS14/04/220400216. If you want to catch me, you need to step forward about ten meters.``
It was only ten meters. ...If he walked about ten meters, he could catch that bratty little girl!!
How many steps did he have to take to walk ten meters?
If he took ten steps to walk ten meters, that meant there would be ten more chances of stepping on a trap.
But... it was only ten steps. ...He can catch her after taking just ten steps!!
``Well, if you really want to catch me, then why not take your first step?@k@vS14/04/220400218. Come on.``
``...Sh-@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1026. Shiiiiiit!!!``

How was he going to take his first step? That area with weeds looked suspicious. But the bare ground looked suspicious, too. What if he jumped onto a tree stump? No, no!! That was what she wanted him to do!!
Cold sweat was dripping off of Skylark 13's body... He only needed to take ten steps. So why was he so nervous about taking the first one?
``...Skylark 13,@k@vS14/00/hiba1311015. from what I can see, the tree stumps look okay.@k@vS14/00/hiba1311016. You can jump on them.``

``...Don't, Skylark 13.@k@vS14/00/ugu0811002. This is Nightingale 8, the one tied to the tree root.@k@vS14/00/ugu0811003. The tree stumps must be traps.@k@vS14/00/ugu0811004. There are too many stumps there, and that's just too suspicious!``

``Can you hear me, Skylark 13!@k@vS14/00/ugu0711005. Don't go into any bushes, it's dangerous!@k@vS14/00/ugu0711006. Don't step on the weeds!@k@vS14/00/ugu0711007. The open ground is dangerous too!!``
``Sh-Shit...@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1028. Then where should I step? Do you want me to fly?!!``
``What on earth are you doing?``
``I'm growing bored waiting for you.@k@vS14/04/220400221. Oh ho ho ho ho!``
``This is Nightingale 9, the one who's tied up...@k@vS14/00/ugu0911002. Right now, one of the targets... is kicking me in the head.@k@vS14/00/ugu0911003. She says that it's a trap field...``
``...Eh?@k@vS14/00/ugu0911005. ...Supposedly, that girl's magnum opus is set up there.@k@vS14/00/ugu0911006. You should be extra careful...``
Y... You've got to be kidding me... Did he say 'magnum opus'? What does he mean by magnum opus? Then what about all the other traps? Weren't they her magnum opus?
We Mountain Dogs are professionals! We're paid to engage in battle!! Yet this little girl is playing us like fools! Can we not beat her?! Can't we beat that brat?!!!
This must be a bluff!! How is it possible for a trap to exist that's worse than what I've seen so far?
That's a bluff, that must be a bluff!! Now I'm definitely going to get her!!!
Sh... Should I start with my right foot... or my left...?
The girl suddenly lifted her hand and thrust it at me. ...Is she... trying to tell me to stop?
``...Five steps.``
``If you can take five steps without stepping on a trap, you win.``
``I... I see. You're confident, aren't you...@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1031. If... I take five steps safely, what are you going to do?``

``Let's see...@k@vS14/04/220400225. I'll admit my loss and surrender. How about that?@k@vS14/04/220400226. My brain is as sharp as ever today.@k@vS14/04/220400227. I'll get you before you take your fifth step!!!``
``Stupid... fucking kid!!!!``
``Calm down, Skylark 13, don't let her provoke you!!``
``...She's a demon. Don't let her appearance fool you.@k@vS14/00/ugu0711009. She can read your mind. We can't defeat her...!``
``Base to Skylark 13!@k@vS14/14/223400130. Don't go any farther!@k@vS14/14/223400131. That's enough!!@k@vS14/14/223400132. Nightingale is almost there.@k@vS14/14/223400133. Just stay in position!!``

``...B-But that would mean I'd lose...@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1034. Five steps?@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1035. Five steps, you say?!@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1036. Dammit, I'm in then! Five steps, right?!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1037. Just five steps, right?!``
``How many times do you need to repeat it?@k@vS14/04/220400229. A man should only say things once, unless he's whispering words of love.``
``Damn you, kiiiiid!!!``
``Skylark 13!!!@k@vS14/00/ugu0811006. She's going to read your mind!!!``
``Calm down.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1040. That's right, I'm Skylark 13.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1041. I'm cool like a fresh mint.``

``...So I need to keep a level head and think.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1043. ...Right. She's already onto my thoughts.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1044. ...She can see how I'll think if I have to take five steps towards her...!!``
``...Hmmm?@k@vS14/04/220400231. Whatever do you mean by that?``
``Heh heh heh heh, haaaahahahahaha!! This is what it means!!!``
``I won't go forward... I'll take five steps backwards!!!@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1046. I did it, I did it!!``

``I was certain it was a trick.@k@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1048. If I take five steps, I win!!@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1049. She didn't say I had to move forward.@k@|@y@vS14/49/VT4Bc_13hibari1050. I can go backwards, too!!``
...That moment.
Thanks to her continued success, Satoko may have gotten a little careless.
She had gotten surrounded by the approaching squad just two tenths of a second later, and was too slow to react.
A dry sound rang out from the tree trunk in front of her, and wood chips scattered everywhere. The moment she tried to look back, another bullet was fired into that same tree.
``Don't move!@k@vS14/00/ugu0211002. Hands up!!``
The enemies approached from behind, stepping on fallen leaves and brushwood.
Judging by the footsteps, there were three... no, four of them. Satoko reluctantly raised her hands and moved them behind her head.
``...Where are the others?``
``I wonder?@k@vS14/04/220400235. Perhaps by now they're fleeing far away via a secret passage.``
Another gunshot. How short-tempered.
And they were firing at a tree to intimidate her... They had probably never fired at a person before. Satoko realized that immediately.
``Answer me!@k@vS14/00/ugu0311002. We'll spare your life only if you call your friends in to help you.``
``That would be most difficult.@k@vS14/04/220400237. Even I have no idea where they might be at the moment.``
``Then... you wanna die right here?``
One of them violently jabbed Satoko in the back with something that felt like a hard stick.
She didn't need to check if it was a gun. Rather than fear the impending danger, she felt a strange resolve, and it actually kind of tickled.
``Oh.@k@vS14/04/220400239. ...That's right, I just remembered the secret password for calling for help.``
``W-what is it?@k@vS14/00/ugu0311004. Tell us!``
Satoko slowly turned back... and grinned, as though she was immediately convinced of her victory.
``Then listen very carefully.@k@vS14/04/220400241. All right?``
``...``Drop dead, Poodles``!!``
``Y-you biiiitch!!``
``...Hey, that's the truth.@k@vS14/03/220300232. Right?``
``Yeah, yeah.@k@vS14/02/220200116. There's something kinda kyute about the name Poodles~ Hau♪.``
``Sorry, Kei-chan!@k@vS14/03/220300234. We're late!``
Our eyes opened wide as soon as we noticed Mion and Rena at the location we planned to meet Satoko at.
``A-are you guys okay?!@k@vS14/01/220100363. W-why are you here??``
``W-well, there's not much to say...@k@vS14/03/220300236. The enemy ambushed us so we had no choice but to take a detour, and then we ran into Satoko...``
``...Hau.@k@vS14/02/220200118. Mii-chan, you went on ahead and didn't wait for me.@k@vS14/02/220200119. That was cruel. You have no idea how many times I almost got hit by traps~!``
``Ah...ahahaha.@k@vS14/03/220300238. I was so caught up in rushing here that, well, I got careless.@k@vS14/03/220300239. But in the end I went back to help you, right?``
``And you really pushed it until ``the end`` before helping, huh~?@k@vS14/02/220200121. Thanks to that, we were able to run into Satoko-chan when she was really in a pinch, though...``
``N-no, that doesn't matter right now...``
I didn't want to get into a long conversation in our current situation, so I interrupted with a question of my own.
``More importantly, are you guys feeling all right?@k@vS14/01/220100366. Did you see a helicopter flying overhead on your way here? Did you inhale any weird fumes?``
``W...weird fumes??@k@vS14/03/220300241. No, but we did have a bit of a fight with an RPG...``
``This is no time to be talking about games!!``
``...Keiichi-san.@k@vS14/04/220400244. By RPG she means an infantry class RPG-7 anti-tank missile launcher.``
Satoko gently tugged at my sleeve as she chimed in. ...Sheesh, how do you know this stuff?

``And we didn't see a helicopter flying around either.@k@vS14/03/220300243. They blew up our car and we pretended to retreat, so they pulled out quickly.@k@vS14/03/220300244. Right now, Kasai should be leading a separate squadron to re-enter from there.``
``And by the way, I thought it was odd they were wearing masks and protective clothing.@k@vS14/02/220200123. They looked like firefighters getting ready to enter a burning oil facility.``
``...What is going on...?``
``I-I wouldn't know...``
Rika-chan, Satoko, and I all looked at one another, then tilted our heads in confusion.
Then what the hell is happening...?

``...Setting that aside for now,@k@vS14/03/220300246. our enemies have greater numbers than expected.@k@vS14/03/220300247. And they're packing firearms.@k@vS14/03/220300248. So this is not an easy situation.``
However!! ...Mion raised her fist and spoke up.
``For better or worse, we're in a position to intercept them!@k@vS14/03/220300250. And we're in a place where Satoko has plenty of traps set up, so you could say this is our home turf!``
``They're getting careless because they think we're just kids, and they have numbers and firepower on their side! So let's show them just how flawed that assessment is!!``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS14/02/220200125. The stronger the enemy, the stronger our fire burns~!@k@vS14/02/220200126. Right, Keiichi-kun?``
``Yup!@k@vS14/01/220100369. Mion, familiarity with the landscape here will be critical in claiming victory!@k@vS14/01/220100370. So, I'll let you take command now!!``

``Sure thing!@k@vS14/03/220300253. I'll show you the secret arts passed down through the generations!@k@vS14/03/220300254. Burn it into your eyes, Kei-chan, because I'm entrusting this to you starting next year!!``
Mion and I grinned and exchanged a high five.
Now... commencing the counterattack!!
